From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Book by F.J. Thwaites

The Dark Abyss

|  |  |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| Author | [F. J. Thwaites](/wiki/F._J._Thwaites "F. J. Thwaites") |
| Language | English |
| Publisher | H. John Edwards |
| Publication date | 1951 |
| Publication place | Australia |
| Published in English | 1955 |

***The Dark Abyss*** is a 1951 novel. It is about Captain Saunders who is injured in the [Korean War](/wiki/Korean_War "Korean War") then falls in love with Dr Balant.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

The book was the first published by a company Thwaites set up for English readers, Harcourts.[[2]](#cite_note-2)

The novel was adapted for Australia radio in 1955. This was a 30-minute radio serial that broadcast until 1956.[[3]](#cite_note-3)

The *Liverpool Post* called it a "hotch potch" which "has to be read to be believed."[[4]](#cite_note-4)

Vol. LXXXVII, no. 8469. South Australia. 29 November 1951. p. 2. Retrieved 8 March 2024 – via National Library of Australia.

3. **[^](#cite_ref-3)** ["Advertising"](http://nla.gov.au/nla.obj-1540602590), *ABC weekly*, **17** (37 (17 September 1955)), Sydney: ABC, nla.obj-1540602590, retrieved 8 March 2024 – via Trove
4. **[^](#cite_ref-4)** "Reviews in Brief". *Liverpool Daily Post*. 15 February 1955. p. 3.
